title: Command Cockpit Quest Node Focus
summary: Added role and current-state treatment to the Command Cockpit Quest level map so the active checkpoint, gate state, and next target are visible as route-node states.
changes: Added role, glyph, and current-state metadata to Quest level-map cells.
Rendered map/XP/active/lock/go glyphs inside each route node without changing the snapshot data contract.
Added pulsing current-node socket styling for active checkpoint and active gate states.
Kept mobile flattened by hiding extra glyph and socket chrome in the narrow cockpit.
Recorded the node-focus pass as the latest platform UI unlock in generated snapshot history.
